title: Tweaky
description: A collection of 90+ lightweight, toggleable, configurable vanilla tweaks.
body:
### Tweaky
A collection of 90+ lightweight, toggleable, configurable tweaks.

### Overview
- Server owners can enable over 90+ tweaks.
- Players can easily view all enabled tweaks via the `/tweaks` GUI.
- Admins can easily view and toggle all available tweaks via the `/tweaky toggle` GUI.
- Supports protection plugins (e.g. WorldGuard).
- Supports adding optional permission nodes for tweak access.
- No dependencies required.

### Learn More
[Click here to learn how to use this plugin.](https://tweaky.scill.me/about/getting-started)

### Documentation
[Click here to view the full documentation.](https://tweaky.scill.me/)

### Support / Suggestions
[Click here for support or to leave a suggestion.](https://discord.gg/9DCPWDXh53)
